mnemonics: Synopsis Interest Drives Deep Learning Presentations (SID-DLP)
Module 5's Finale: Your Idea, Your Presentation (F-I-Y-P)
keyPoints: The synopsis must be based on a topic of the student's personal interest within Deep Learning or Reinforcement Learning.
A presentation is a required component of the assessment for this module.
The work should demonstrate understanding of core concepts from the module applied to a chosen problem or area.
commonMistakes: Choosing an overly broad or complex topic that is difficult to cover in a synopsis and short presentation.
Focusing on description rather than analysis and application of learned concepts.
Poor time management, leaving insufficient time to prepare a coherent presentation after writing the synopsis.
